Home > LLM > NotebookLM

NotebookLM

★★★★☆ Completely free Paid from: Completely free

Visit official site →

Google's AI research tool, completely free. Up to 50 sources per notebook, auto-generates podcasts, video overviews, reports. Most underrated free AI tool of 2026.

Free Credits Details

  • Amount: Completely free
  • Reset: N/A
  • Watermark: N/A
  • Commercial: Personal use

Key Features

  • Document analysis and Q&A
  • Auto podcast generation
  • Auto video overview
  • Report generation
  • Mind maps
  • 50 sources per notebook

Pros

  • Completely free no limits
  • Unique podcast generation
  • Answers based on source material
  • Google ecosystem integration

Cons

  • Requires Google account
  • May need VPN in China
  • Podcasts currently English only

Tips

  • Try podcast generation first after uploading
  • Best for academic research and product analysis
  • Use with ChatGPT for best results
